error_signature: The connection was aborted, perhaps the server is offline
title: Connection aborted during long-running workflow in n8n cloud
symptom: While executing a complex workflow with many API calls, the user experiences connection abort errors after extended execution time.
applies_when: Running a long workflow with multiple API calls
not_this_if: Shorter workflows that complete without issues
root_cause: n8n cloud may impose timeouts on long-running workflows, leading to connection aborts when the execution exceeds a certain duration. This can be particularly problematic for workflows that involve multiple slow API calls.
fix_steps: Host n8n on your own server instead of using n8n cloud
Configure the server to handle longer execution times without timeouts
agent_instruction: Consider self-hosting n8n to avoid timeout issues with long-running workflows.
